cookieBanner.message: We use cookies to ensure the proper functioning of our site and to improve your experience. Essential cookies are always active. You can choose to enable analytics and marketing cookies.
cookieBanner.essentialDesc: Required for the site to work correctly (always active)
cookieBanner.analyticsDesc: Help us understand how visitors use the site
cookieBanner.marketingDesc: Used to display relevant ads and campaigns

settingsPage.title: Privacy & Data Protection
settingsPage.subtitle: GDPR compliance, data retention, customer data requests and audit trail.
settingsPage.retentionDesc: Configure how long different types of data are kept before automatic deletion.
settingsPage.applyRetentionConfirm: This will permanently delete data older than the configured retention periods. Continue?
settingsPage.requestsDesc: Process GDPR data export (Article 15) and erasure (Article 17) requests.
settingsPage.deletionFailed: Deletion failed. Check logs for details.
settingsPage.auditDesc: Immutable log of all privacy-related actions.
settingsPage.consentAtCheckoutDesc: When enabled, customers must explicitly opt-in to marketing emails before providing their email at checkout.
